agent_output: I've created **`AGENTS_BACKUP.md`** at the repository root. It's a complete snapshot of the main project configuration from `AGENTS.md` (the Claude Flow V3 Agent Guide). This backup preserves all the workflow instructions, command reference tables, swarm recipes, and coordination patterns in case the original is ever modified or lost.
